ops.title: cc-steer E11: write verdict.md + finalize once com.cc-steer.e11-probs completes (fires 03:00)

ops.text: check results/E11/phases/sweep.done + cells/sweep_primary.json; fable writes results/E11/verdict.md per writing-docs skill (prereg rule + CID on PRIMARY strata, secondary deltas, slop-cop lint); uv run python -m harness.run_e11 finalize; journal verdict; if cid_trip=true the outcome is stopped_by_cid with the per-stratum AUC table
